title: Concept maps (book-wide collection, per Teaching Tech Together)

maps.description: A COLLECTION of small maps, one per chapter or concept cluster — never one ever-growing graph. Growth = adding maps and cross-references between them.

mermaid.description: Mermaid graph source. RULES (Wilson): every edge MUST carry a linking phrase so node-edge-node reads as a sentence ('memtable --flushes into--> SSTable'); at most ~9 concepts per map (7±2 — a concept map pictures working memory); relationships, not control flow — this is not a flowchart. Gaps/inserted units may appear as nodes.
